data.body:
Reviewed cold against plan + audit-prompt §10 + acceptance criteria. PASS.

Verification:
- Audit doc structure matches §10 (Page metadata / Scope / House identity / Inversion / Cross-house leak / Typography / Color / Forward observations / Gap appendix). ✓
- House identity binding 'neighborhood' id → 'Visit' displayName → 'house-visit-*' token slug stated explicitly and applied uniformly. No 'house-neighborhood-*' appears anywhere. ✓
- 4 typography rows + 7 color rows + 1 EXCLUDED + 1 JUSTIFY = full coverage of NeighborhoodPage's text-bearing and color-bearing nodes. ✓
- 8 worked-example rows from plan reproduced verbatim in prescribed order. ✓
- text-foreground L13 mispairing flagged as NEAR with visible-rendering-change (charcoal → cream) note — the load-bearing Visit-specific finding vs. Campus's all-imperceptible deltas. ✓
- text-white at L30,33,37,56 → NEAR → text-house-visit-light-foreground (4 sites, one master row). ✓
- Raw #889460 → EXACT → house-visit-light; raw #4A5A30 (SectorHeader) → EXACT → house-visit-deep; raw #4A5A30 (FractalPattern) → EXCLUDED. Mirrors Campus precedent. ✓
- MandelbrotCorners card: bg-foreground/[0.03] + border-foreground/20 EXACT on canonical foreground; pairing addition NEAR (add text-house-visit-light-foreground to card). ✓
- PretextParagraph L54 GAP-LOG-AND-MIGRATE; entry appended to audit-gaps.md citing Lab parent entry + TEXT_SIZES.sm vs TEXT_SIZES.base size delta. ✓
- Forward observations: compact-card density, /[0.03] arbitrary alpha, dead-inheritance L13 text-foreground. Useful for Apply review. ✓
- pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm test = 4 baseline failures (Footer FRAC-88 italic, Footer Jacquard, Navigation mobile labels, Neighborhood min-h-screen) — matches FRAC-25 documented baseline. No new regressions. ✓
- No src/, DESIGN.md, audit-prompt.md, or sibling audit doc changes. Only .lattice/ files modified. ✓

Visit IS a house page; load-bearing identity binding correctly applied. Ready for FRAC-33 (Apply).
